mapper.sql: target_id AS "targetId", user_id AS "userId", company_nature AS "companyNature", company_scale AS "companyScale", location, salary_range AS "salaryRange", domains, positions, preferred_companies AS "preferredCompanies", notes, updated_at AS "updatedAt"

record_id AS "recordId", user_id AS "userId", company, city, company_nature AS "companyNature", company_scale AS "companyScale", position_name AS "positionName", salary_range AS "salaryRange", favorite_key AS "favoriteKey", business_direction AS "businessDirection", interview_round AS "interviewRound", interview_time AS "interviewTime", interview_content AS "interviewContent", interview_format AS "interviewFormat", result, reflection, job_description AS "jobDescription", interview_process AS "interviewProcess", next_action AS "nextAction", status, priority, tags_json AS "tagsJson", enabled, created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt"
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM journey_target WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO journey_target( user_id, company_nature, company_scale, location, salary_range, domains, positions, preferred_companies, notes, updated_at, target_id ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{companyNature}, #{companyScale}, #{location}, #{salaryRange}, #{domains}, #{positions}, #{preferredCompanies}, #{notes}, #{updatedAt}, #{targetId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE journey_target SET user_id = #{userId}, company_nature = #{companyNature}, company_scale = #{companyScale}, location = #{location}, salary_range = #{salaryRange}, domains = #{domains}, positions = #{positions}, preferred_companies = #{preferredCompanies}, notes = #{notes}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE target_id = #{targetId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO journey_record( user_id, company, city, company_nature, company_scale, position_name, salary_range, favorite_key, business_direction, interview_round, interview_time, interview_content, interview_format, result, reflection, job_description, interview_process, next_action, status, priority, tags_json, enabled, updated_at, record_id ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{company}, #{city}, #{companyNature}, #{companyScale}, #{positionName}, #{salaryRange}, #{favoriteKey}, #{businessDirection}, #{interviewRound}, #{interviewTime}, #{interviewContent}, #{interviewFormat}, #{result}, #{reflection}, #{jobDescription}, #{interviewProcess}, #{nextAction}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{tagsJson}, #{enabled}, #{updatedAt}, #{recordId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE journey_record SET user_id = #{userId}, company = #{company}, city = #{city}, company_nature = #{companyNature}, company_scale = #{companyScale}, position_name = #{positionName}, salary_range = #{salaryRange}, favorite_key = #{favoriteKey}, business_direction = #{businessDirection}, interview_round = #{interviewRound}, interview_time = #{interviewTime}, interview_content = #{interviewContent}, interview_format = #{interviewFormat}, result = #{result}, reflection = #{reflection}, job_description = #{jobDescription}, interview_process = #{interviewProcess}, next_action = #{nextAction}, status = #{status}, priority = #{priority}, tags_json = #{tagsJson}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE record_id = #{recordId}
